# Release Checklist

Release:
Date:
Owner:

## Governance

- [ ] Scope approved
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` reviewed and updated if needed
- [ ] Version is correct

## Quality

- [ ] Local quality gates passed
- [ ] CI passed
- [ ] Security workflow passed

## Documentation

- [ ] ADR or RFC updates completed if required
- [ ] Governance, security, or observability docs updated if impacted

## Risks

- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Observability impact reviewed
- [ ] Migration or rollback considerations documented
